person.biography: Outgoing adventurous dad/husband loves spending time with family. Trying different cuisines and exploring new hikes.
person.name: Donovan Morta
person.achievements: Waking up every morning being thankful for another day.

people.achievements: The greatest milestones were getting saved✝️ > meeting my wife💍 > starting my career in programming👨🏾‍💻, and raising our doggy🐶

people.interests:
I enjoy talking to people, going out, travelling, video games, DIY work, and fixing things myself.
I'm a full-time passionate web developer (built this form and FamilyTree app). I like watching anime, Sci-Fi, horror, back in the day, superhero and comedy movies and series. Also love hiking.
